/tmp/codeql-scratch-488082c7541e5bf8/dbs/cpp/working/autobuild/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_features.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_features.dir/tests/test_features.cpp.o -o test_features  libcrypto_lib.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.12.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.9.1.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_system.so.1.83.0 -lpthread -lcurses /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libform.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a
